title: conyza mildbraedii
intro: Conyza mildbraedii, also known as African fleabane, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Conyza mildbraedii is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
